objective: Validate all 10 acceptance criteria for grove doctor: core::harness sentinel constants, core::doctor types/diagnose, universal checks, harness drift detection, lock_integrity, explore-mode checks, Cmd::Doctor CLI verb with --json and exit-code semantics.
key_changes: AC1 PASS: core/src/harness.rs is single source of truth; cli/src/init.rs imports via grove_core::harness alias — no local duplicates.
AC2 PASS: core::doctor exports Status, Check, Report, diagnose — pure read-only verified by source inspection.
AC3 PASS: Doctor dispatch converts --explore/--standard to ModeChoice; diagnose calls active_mode(root,force) internally.
AC4 PASS: All 11 universal checks present: grove_version, config_present, legacy_explore_json, 4 harness sub-checks, registry_root, grammar_cache, project_languages, lock_integrity.
AC5 PASS: Harness checks Fail on drift with 'grove init --as <mode>' hint; 4 drift unit tests validate specific mismatch scenarios.
AC6 PASS: lock_integrity via verify_lock; absent→Warn (not Fail); Mismatch→Fail; Missing→Warn; unit test confirms boundary.
AC7 PASS: explore_checks gated on Mode::McpLlm; all 5 explore checks present; HealthError hints surfaced verbatim.
AC8 PASS: Cmd::Doctor + global --json + exit 1 from std::process::exit(1); 4 integration tests confirm both output formats.
AC9 PASS: Report::ok() is all(!Fail); warn_only_report_exits_zero unit test directly validates Warn/Info exits 0.
AC10 PASS: clippy clean; 303 tests (177+92+33+1), 0 failed; doctor_help_documents_verb confirms --help coverage.
